ddls:
CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer to the question */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the question (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., multiple choice, true/false) */,
  "question_explanation" TEXT /* Explanation or additional information for the question */,
  "question_tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords for the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the question was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the question was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Songs, Traditions) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords for the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture or avatar of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Bio or description of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location or country of the user */,
  "social_media_profiles" TEXT /* Social media profiles of the user */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* Notification preferences of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the game session */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the user in the session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the game session */,
  "device_browser_info" TEXT /* Device or browser information of the user during the game session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session during which the answer was submitted */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being answered */,
  "user_answer" TEXT /* Answer submitted by the user */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Whether the answer is correct or not */,
  "answer_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the answer was submitted */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the answer submission */,
  "device_browser_info" TEXT /* Device or browser information of the user during the answer submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category for which the leaderboard is generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who achieved the score */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the user */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user in the leaderboard */,
  "leaderboard_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the leaderboard was generated */,
  "leaderboard_type" TEXT /* Type of the leaderboard (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "leaderboard_scope" TEXT /* Scope of the leaderboard (e.g., global, friends, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was awarded the badge */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the badge */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date on which the badge was awarded */,
  "badge_image" TEXT /* Image or icon of the badge */,
  "badge_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria or requirements for the badge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_badges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
